DescribeServicesNames.serviceName: Filter by application name; if not set, all applications are returned
DescribeServicesNames.language: Filter by language; if not set, all languages are returned
DescribeServicesNames.env: Filter by env; if not set, applications of all envs are returned
DescribeServicesNames.source: Filter by application source; options: APP_BUILDER (Qianfan AppBuilder)
DescribeServicesNames.tag: Filter by tag (single selection). key="@@@" means no tag; key="@@@" and value="@@@" means all tags; key="abc" and value="@@@" means all resources with key "abc"
DescribeServicesNames.orderBy: Sort field; options: requests, requestsPerSecond, errors, errorRate, durationSeconds, abSuccessRate, abErrorRate, abRequests, abDurationSeconds, llmErrorRate, llmTokens
DescribeServicesNames.metricFilters.op: Filter operator; options: `=` - equals, `!=` - not equals, `contains` - contains
